import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/EmergencySafety.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/EmergencySafety.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { Phone, AlertTriangle, MapPin, FileText, Heart } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
const emergencyContacts = [
  { id: "1", name: "Emergency Services", role: "Police", phone: "911", type: "police" },
  { id: "2", name: "City General Hospital", role: "Emergency Room", phone: "555-0100", type: "hospital" },
  { id: "3", name: "John Anderson", role: "Safety Manager", phone: "555-0123", type: "manager" },
  { id: "4", name: "Fire Department", role: "Emergency Response", phone: "911", type: "fire" }
];
const emergencyProcedures = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Fire Emergency",
    type: "fire",
    icon: AlertTriangle,
    steps: [
      "Activate the nearest fire alarm",
      "Evacuate the building immediately",
      "Do not use elevators",
      "Proceed to designated assembly point",
      "Call emergency services (911)",
      "Do not re-enter until authorized"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Medical Emergency",
    type: "medical",
    icon: Heart,
    steps: [
      "Call emergency services immediately (911)",
      "Do not move the injured person unless necessary",
      "Notify your supervisor or safety manager",
      "Provide first aid if trained",
      "Stay with the person until help arrives",
      "Document the incident"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "Security Threat",
    type: "security",
    icon: AlertTriangle,
    steps: [
      "Move to a safe location immediately",
      "Lock doors and turn off lights if possible",
      "Silence mobile phones",
      "Call 911 when safe to do so",
      "Do not confront the threat",
      "Follow instructions from authorities"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "4",
    title: "Natural Disaster",
    type: "natural",
    icon: AlertTriangle,
    steps: [
      "Follow building evacuation procedures",
      "Move to designated safe areas",
      "Stay away from windows and glass",
      "Listen to emergency broadcasts",
      "Do not use elevators",
      "Account for all personnel"
    ]
  }
];
export default function EmergencySafety() {
  _s();
  const [selectedProcedure, setSelectedProcedure] = useState(null);
  const handleCall = (phone, name) => {
    alert(`📞 Calling ${name}: ${phone}`);
  };
  const getContactIcon = (type) => {
    switch (type) {
      case "police":
        return "🚔";
      case "hospital":
        return "🏥";
      case "manager":
        return "👨‍💼";
      case "fire":
        return "🚒";
      default:
        return "📞";
    }
  };
  const getProcedureColor = (type) => {
    switch (type) {
      case "fire":
        return "from-red-600 to-orange-600";
      case "medical":
        return "from-blue-600 to-cyan-600";
      case "security":
        return "from-yellow-600 to-orange-600";
      case "natural":
        return "from-purple-600 to-pink-600";
      default:
        return "from-gray-600 to-gray-500";
    }
  };

_s(EmergencySafety, "CvyECn/XHJJbDJZ2NsT30mYfIyM=");
_c = EmergencySafety;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "EmergencySafety");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/EmergencySafety.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/EmergencySafety.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
